author: xhayden
description: Create flashcards on Mochi.cards using the API provided by Mochi's Pro subscription.

manifest.author: Hayden Carpenter
manifest.description: Create flashcards on Mochi.cards using the API provided by Mochi's Pro subscription.
manifest.name: Mochi Cards Pro

name: Mochi Cards Pro

releases.author: xHayden
releases.name: Fix rate limiting issues and add loading indicator

releases.author: xHayden
releases.description:
Adds suggestion from #1 allowing the change of delimiters that denotes the place a card begins. Thanks @pmz!
Also adds a suggestion from Jens Jakob for displaying relative paths for mochi decks in the upload modal.

If anyone else has suggestions reach out to me or create an issue.
releases.name: Add relative paths for deck list and add setting to change delimiter

releases.author: xHayden
releases.description: Change desc, change requests to requestUrl, remove dead code
releases.name: Change desc, change requests to requestUrl, remove dead code

releases.author: xHayden
releases.description: Refactor the codebase to be more modular and readable. Replace all uses of `any` with accurate types.
releases.name: Refactor for Readability + Typings

releases.author: xHayden
releases.description: This is the first release of the Mochi.card Pro card creator. It has support creating basic cards separated by H1s in Markdown by using the the Export Cards from Text command.
releases.name: First Release
